top_signals.title: Gulf Tanker Rates Nearly Double as Middle East Exports Ramp Up
top_signals.summary: Oil tanker operators are reaping record profits after nearly doubling the hire cost of vessels going through the Strait of Hormuz and wider Gulf region this week on rising demand as traffic through the waterway slowly picks up, according to shipping data…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chinese Advanced Aircraft Carrier Passes Through Sensitive Taiwan Strait
top_signals.summary: China's newest and most advanced aircraft carrier, the Fujian, sailed through the Taiwan Strait on Tuesday, the Taiwanese defence ministry said, the first such mission in the sensitive waterway since April.Taiwan, which Beijing views as its territory…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump directs federal agencies to protect US data from quantum threats
top_signals.summary: An executive order signed Monday aims to accelerate the government's transition to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), a new generation of encryption designed to protect data from the powerful quantum computers expected in the future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump ally blocks Czech president from Nato summit
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Andrej Babiš triggers constitutional dispute with former Nato general Petr Pavel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
